skills.name: epicgram-safe-mode
skills.description: Mandatory safety gate before any risky action — classify GREEN/YELLOW/ORANGE/RED and gate accordingly.

skills.name: epicgram-review-and-approval
skills.description: Human-in-the-loop approval loop — AI proposes, operator decides via structured cards.

skills.name: epicgram-content-brief
skills.description: Transforms raw ideas into structured briefs for downstream content skills.

skills.name: epicgram-script-writer
skills.description: Converts an approved brief into a scene-by-scene video script with hook, voiceover, and CTA.

skills.name: epicgram-caption-hashtags
skills.description: Generates per-platform captions, hashtag sets, and cross-promo blocks from a brief or script.

skills.name: epicgram-multiposting-scheduler
skills.description: Manages the publishing queue, scheduling, and retry logic across all platforms.

skills.name: epicgram-n8n-orchestrator
skills.description: Triggers and monitors n8n workflows from EPICGRAM operator context with safety gate.

skills.name: epicgram-instagram-graph
skills.description: Publishes feed posts, reels, and carousels to Instagram via Graph API.

skills.name: epicgram-telegram-client-ops
skills.description: Sends, edits, and deletes Telegram messages/posts across channels, groups, and DMs via TDLib.

skills.name: epicgram-cursor-workflow
skills.description: How Cursor IDE agents should discover, load, and chain EPICGRAM skills.

skills.name: epicgram-claude-code-workflow
skills.description: How Claude Code agents should load and chain EPICGRAM skills with correct tool-use patterns.

skills.name: epicgram-gemini-cli-workflow
skills.description: How Gemini CLI should load EPICGRAM skills using @file syntax and aliases.

skills.name: epicgram-nanobot-assistant
skills.description: Configures nanobot to use EPICGRAM skills as a persistent background content assistant.

skills.name: epicgram-skill-scaffolder
skills.description: Generates a new skill directory with correct structure and registry entry.

skills.name: epicgram-skill-linter
skills.description: Validates skill directory structure, SKILL.md completeness, and registry consistency.

skills.name: epicgram-account-identity
skills.description: Manages persona, tone, niche, constraints, and goals per EPICGRAM account.

skills.name: epicgram-workspace-memory
skills.description: Persistent memory across projects, campaigns, channels, and previous actions.

skills.name: epicgram-content-analytics
skills.description: Collects post metrics and generates next-content recommendations.

skills.name: epicgram-moderation-and-abuse
skills.description: Policy, abuse, privacy, and unsafe automation checks before publishing.

skills.name: epicgram-tiktok-publisher
skills.description: Prepares and publishes TikTok videos with metadata and sound track compliance.

skills.name: epicgram-youtube-shorts-publisher
skills.description: Uploads YouTube Shorts with title, description, and playlist/series logic.

skills.name: epicgram-facebook-pages
skills.description: Facebook Pages publishing, comments, and cross-post adaptations.

skills.name: epicgram-video-assembly
skills.description: Instructions and pipeline for assembling videos, shorts, and reels from scripts.

skills.name: epicgram-core-routing
skills.description: Routes operator tasks to the correct skill chain — content, publishing, analytics, moderation.

skills.name: epicgram-skill-registry
skills.description: Single index of all skills with versions, tags, and client compatibility info.

skills.name: epicgram-skill-audit
skills.description: Audits which skills are called most, where errors occur, and where approval checkpoints are needed.
